dialogue_texts: Yumemura is surely a strange village. It doesn't appear to be as lively as Kozankyo...
And is this the mansion I'm looking for?
What are you trying to do with it?
You don't look like that serpent creature I fought just now...
What have you done with my sister Ryuuko!?
Yes. I am her sister Saika Tatsumaru.
Are you two part of a specific species of humanoid-snake hybrids?
Yes, we are. This is how we've been since the two of us hatched out of our eggs.
So, tell me here. Is this the very mansion containing a person infected with glohm? I think this is it.
Both my sister and I are the pets of Berenice Grieg.
We are tasked with defending her and her now glohmed maid.
There's someone with glohm inside? I must be getting close.
The mansion is Order territory and off-limits to non-members.
Of course you'd say that. From the start, I knew you wouldn't let me in.
Berenice didn't invite any guests, and if you went in anyway, you'll just be glohmed.
I will let my own danmaku decide who can go in.
Let me see if you can survive the heat of my serpentine flame.
